DecisionCardMeta.description: Shared metadata attached to every Slab 7c gate-family DecisionCard.

affected_nodes.description: Manifest node ids affected by this decision card.

override_trail.description: Operator override events already applied to this run.
override_trail.title: Override Trail

OverrideEvent.description: One operator-approved override that affects cache warmth and routing context.

applied_at.description: Timezone-aware timestamp for when the override applied.
applied_at.title: Applied At

confirm_token.description: Confirmation token bound to the override submission surface.
confirm_token.title: Confirm Token

event_id.description: UUID4 identity for this override event.
event_id.title: Event Id

new_value.description: Canonical JSON-like view of the new setting.
new_value.title: New Value

node_id.description: Manifest node id that the override touches.
node_id.title: Node Id

operator_id.description: Operator identity that confirmed the override.
operator_id.title: Operator Id

previous_value.description: Canonical JSON-like view of the previous setting.
previous_value.title: Previous Value

OverrideEvent.title: OverrideEvent

card_id.description: UUID4 identity for this DecisionCard instance.
card_id.title: Card Id

corpus_confirmation_summary.description: Non-empty operator-facing summary of corpus confirmation.
corpus_confirmation_summary.title: Corpus Confirmation Summary

corpus_paths_confirmed.description: Corpus paths confirmed by the operator for this trial.
corpus_paths_confirmed.title: Corpus Paths Confirmed

created_at.description: Timezone-aware creation timestamp for the emitted card.
created_at.title: Created At

decision_card_digest.description: Lowercase sha256 digest of the canonical decision card.
decision_card_digest.title: Decision Card Digest

directive_run_id.description: UUID4 identity for the directive-composer run being confirmed.

gate_focus.description: Closed marker for the G0 trial-open gate family.

gate_id.description: Discriminator for the G0 trial-open gate.

schema_version.description: Schema version for the G0 DecisionCard contract.

trial_id.description: UUID4 identity for the enclosing trial run.

verb.description: Closed decision verb set: approve | edit | reject.
